title: workflow block responses during creation and/or during run activity
excerpt: I’d love the ability to see workflow block responses either during the activity run log OR while I’m creating the workflow so I know whether the workflow would work or is responding correctly.

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love the ability to see workflow block responses either during the activity run log OR while I’m creating the workflow so I know whether the workflow would work or is responding correctly.
